name: Google Gemini Effect
summary: A scroll-triggered SVG animation featuring multiple colorful wavy paths that draw themselves progressively as users scroll, creating a mesmerizing visual effect inspired by Google's Gemini AI presentation.
detailedDescription: The Google Gemini Effect component creates a stunning scroll-based animation where multiple colorful SVG paths progressively draw themselves as users scroll down the page. The component features 5 distinct wavy paths in different colors (pink, orange, light blue, medium blue, and deep blue) that animate their pathLength from 0 to 1 based on scroll position. Each path has a corresponding blurred duplicate underneath that creates a soft glow effect using SVG Gaussian blur filters. The animation is sticky, staying in viewport while the paths draw, creating a hypnotic effect that keeps users engaged. The component includes placeholder title and description text that can be customized. This effect is perfect for hero sections, feature showcases, or any context where you want to create a memorable, technical visual that rewards scrolling. The smooth linear transition creates a continuous drawing effect that feels magical and polished.
purpose: Create mesmerizing scroll-triggered SVG path animations
Reward user scrolling with progressive visual reveals
Add technical, magical aesthetic to hero or feature sections
Keep users engaged through hypnotic drawing animations
Showcase technical sophistication through SVG animation
behavior: Animates 5 colorful SVG paths based on scroll position
Uses motion pathLength values to control draw progress
Applies Gaussian blur to duplicate paths for glow effects
Sticky positioning keeps animation in viewport during scroll
Linear transition timing creates smooth continuous drawing
Customizable title and description text overlays
Paths draw progressively from 0 to 1 as user scrolls
visualCharacteristics: Multiple colorful wavy paths in gradient colors
Progressive drawing animation revealing paths on scroll
Soft glow effects from blurred duplicate paths
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
